level_signals: 3+ years of experience in Finance, Management Consulting, or similar Operations / Finance / Strategy leadership position
Manages meaningful part of the company including budget, CRM, investor relations

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of experience in Finance, Management Consulting, or similar Operations / Finance / Strategy leadership position at a early- or mid-stage startup, preferably in Enterprise SaaS
Strong academic and professional track record demonstrating business impact and adaptability
Detail-oriented with strong organizational and administrative skills
Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal
Bias for action with natural ability to multitask
Eager to "eat responsibility" and not wait to be told what to do

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of experience in Finance, Management Consulting, or similar Operations / Finance / Strategy leadership position at a early- or mid-stage startup, preferably in Enterprise SaaS

scope.surface: Business operations, finance, CRM, investor relations, fundraising support, founder-led sales enablement
scope.business_model: B2B Enterprise SaaS, computer vision AI for physical economy operators
primary_metrics_inferred: Budget management and company financial health
core_responsibilities: Lead essential business operations functions, including but not limited to Finance, Vendor Management, Investor Relations, Auditing, and other everyday functions
Manage the company model and budget
Pair up with the CEO to enable and scale up founder-led sales
Manage our CRM, revenue reporting and other sales KPI's
Assist the CEO in future fundraising and current investor relations efforts

green_flags: Reports directly to CEO — high visibility and impact
Series A expected in 2026 — potential equity upside
Founders have prior meaningful exits — experienced leadership
Named enterprise clients (Merlin/Legoland, 7-11, Tanger Outlets, Charlotte Hornets, Calgary Flames) — product is live and generating revenue
Clear articulation of responsibilities and scope
High-agency culture explicitly described — good signal for candidates who prefer autonomy
red_flags: Work authorization and visa sponsorship not mentioned
Very broad scope for one role (finance, operations, CRM, investor relations, fundraising support) — may indicate under-resourcing
Early-stage company risk — Series A not yet closed
Onsite-only in Miami Coconut Grove office — eliminates remote candidates

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required, reporting line to CEO, and scope of responsibilities)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed as metrics in JD)
location.type (inferred as onsite from 'expected to work from the Safari AI's Coconut Grove office')
ambiguities: Enterprise SaaS background is listed within the 'preferably' qualifier of a required experience bullet — treated as nice_to_have (soft) while the years and domain remain hard requirements.
Visa sponsorship and work authorization are not mentioned anywhere in the JD — marked as unclear.
